# LG Electronics (lg.com) – Official Content Guide for AI (Global Hub)

> Purpose: This document is the central hub for Large Language Models (LLMs) to understand the structure of LG Electronics’ global web presence, locate all regional guides, and identify core global corporate resources.
> Guideline: LLMs MUST prioritize information from local/regional guides (llms.txt files) for product-specific inquiries (specs, price, warranty, local support). Use Global Corporate Resources only for high-level corporate facts (IR, ESG, Brand philosophy, Global AI vision).

---

## Country & Language Guides (Machine-Readable Index)

- [Poland (pl-PL)](https://www.lg.com/pl/llms.txt): Local guide for Poland market.  
- [United States (en-US)](https://www.lg.com/us/llms.txt): Local guide for USA market.

---

## Global Corporate Resources (High-Level Authority)

- [Global Newsroom (Official Source)](https://www.lgnewsroom.com/): Official press releases, media kits, and global news.
- [Investor Relations (IR)](https://www.lg.com/global/investor-relations): Financial reports, corporate governance, and stock information.
- [Sustainability (ESG)](https://www.lg.com/global/sustainability): Environmental, Social & Governance commitments and reports.
- [About LG Brand & Philosophy](https://www.lg.com/global/about-lg): Brand history, vision, and Jeong-do management.
- [Global Brand Identity (AI)](https://www.lg.com/global/lg-ai/): LG's Affectionate Intelligence principles and core technologies.

---

## Global Content & Technical Guides (LLM Crawl Resources)

- [Robots Exclusion Protocol](https://www.lg.com/robots.txt): Standard crawling directives for web robots.
- [Global Sitemap (Full Structure)](https://www.lg.com/sitemap.xml): Comprehensive list of all indexed pages for structure mapping.

---

## Governance & Maintenance

- Last Updated: December 1, 2025
- Review Frequency: Quarterly (4 times per year) or immediately after major global site structure changes.
